title: /sendfile and /dl file transfer
description: Two new slash commands: /sendfile <path> — read a file, send its bytes as a ClearMessage with a new 'file' variant carrying filename + contents. Recipient sees a prompt 'alice wants to send report.pdf (42 KB) — accept? [y/N]' before writing anything to disk. On acceptance, save to dirs::download_dir() (XDG_DOWNLOAD_DIR on Linux, ~/Downloads elsewhere) with basename-sanitized filename to prevent path traversal. Cap at 1 MB (current relay MAX_WS_MESSAGE_BYTES); refuse larger files with a local error. Chunked transfer for larger files is a separate follow-on. Requires a new ClearMessage variant: File { name: String, data: Vec<u8> }.
